name: ESP32
summary: Espressif's flagship Wi-Fi + Bluetooth SoC family.
shouldUpgrade: If you're on 5.1 or earlier and shipping new hardware, upgrading to 5.3 unlocks Wi-Fi 6 (C6) and meaningful power tooling. Existing fleets on 5.2 can wait unless you need Thread/Matter improvements.

faq.a: No. There are breaking API changes around Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and the build system. Plan a migration sprint.
ESP32-C3, C6, H2, S3, and ESP32 (classic) support Matter via ESP-Matter SDK.

name: nRF Connect SDK
summary: Nordic's unified SDK for nRF52, nRF53, and nRF91 series.
shouldUpgrade: Recommended for any project starting after Q1 2024. Existing nRF91 cellular projects should validate modem firmware compatibility before upgrading.

faq.q: Does v2.6 require a new modem firmware?
faq.a: It is recommended but not strictly required for nRF9160. Check the release notes for your exact part.
